name: Nebula Emission Area and Masked Flux Measurement
description: Analyze the Hubble Space Telescope image of the Eagle Nebula at ~/AstroImages/emission_analysis/656nmos.fits. Create a binary mask of the image using a threshold value defined as the image Mean plus three times the image Standard Deviation (Mean + 3 * StdDev). Save the resulting mask to ~/AstroImages/emission_analysis/output/emission_mask.tif. Calculate the total emission area in square arcseconds using a plate scale of 0.1 arcsec/pixel (0.01 square arcseconds per pixel) and measure the mean intensity of the original image pixels within the masked region. Save the results to ~/AstroImages/emission_analysis/output/emission_report.txt with the following lines: 'image_mean = [value]', 'image_stddev = [value]', 'threshold_value = [value]', 'emission_area_sq_arcsec = [value]', and 'masked_mean_intensity = [value]'.
